xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #50

plan.title: Foghorn 3: use C2 and F1 for two-tone horn

narratives.Description: Foghorn 3: use C2 and F1 for two-tone horn
narratives.Overview:
## Request

Fog horn 3 (`fog-horn-3` / `fogHorn3`) should use notes **C2** and **F1** for its two-tone horn.

## Current behavior

Fog horn 3 is a gated two-blast horn that currently uses **F2** then **D♭2** (≈87.31 Hz / 69.3 Hz):

- Voice: `src/audio/voices.ts` (`fogHorn3` → `gatedTwoBlastHorn`)
- Catalog entry: `src/lib/meditation.ts` (`id: "fog-horn-3"`)

## Expected behavior

- Tone 1: **C2**
- Tone 2: **F1**
- Keep the existing two-tone / hard-gated blast structure unless tuning requires small timing tweaks

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Fog horn 3 plays C2 then F1 (documented Hz constants or equivalent, consistent with fog horns 2/4)
- [ ] Meditation voice description / labels updated if they still say F / D♭
- [ ] Tests cover the new tuning (mirror fog horn 2/4 tuning tests if applicable)
narratives.Requirements:
FR-1: fogHorn3 / fog-horn-3 tone 1 is C2 (~65.41 Hz) and tone 2 is F1 (~43.66 Hz), perfect fifth (7 semitones) down, via named Hz constants mirroring fog horns 2/4.
FR-2: Meditation catalog description for fog-horn-3 no longer says F / D♭; it documents C then F.
FR-3: voices.test.ts covers fog horn 3 tuning interval + Hz (mirror fog horn 2/4 tests).
NFR-1: Keep existing gated two-blast structure/timing; pitch/constants/docs/tests only.
narratives.LockedDecisions: Refinement 2026-07-13 (#50 Evaluate lock, operator accept+implement): (1) AC locked as FR-1–3 + NFR-1 — fogHorn3 uses C2 then F1 only. (2) Out of scope: other fog/ship horns, timing redesign, announce files, UI beyond catalog description.

items.title: Fog horn 3 plays C2 then F1 (documented Hz constants or equivalent, consistent with fog horns 2/4)
Meditation voice description / labels updated if they still say F / D♭
Tests cover the new tuning (mirror fog horn 2/4 tuning tests if applicable)
